app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: AI-second, búikke zaa zaiyét accessible findings-or library, manual reports-o jaldi copy itaróon laigí
search.label: Tuñí ki dekésas oitta biyán kor
search.placeholder: jemon modal close button, kono accessible name nái
search.hint_submit: Biboron likh Bilañ wá Enter çap.
search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
results.no_results_announce: '{query}' loi kono result nái. Ekkán component-r naam, element type, naailé onnó ekta phrase diyé coista koro.
results.no_results_body: Ekkán component-r naam (masolan 'button'), element type (masolan 'input'), naailé onnó ekta phrase diyé coista koro.
detail.location_placeholder: domola: Omuom: / Basket: / Jinish biboron pata:
detail.refine_hint_ai: Ki bodlaiyé dibo iyya describe kortê, AI rewrote kortê aapnar update ba detail zog koriyé dibo. Aapnar AI model bodlaiyé ba iyya off kortê paróben
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Uporer field sodhro thore, wá bodol ekhone likh. AI çalu kor
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: domola: eita mobile loi kor, element tooltip
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Udaharon: "Erokum Critical severity-or Finding pura Onboarding Flow-e ase. Lower severity issue thákle, oingún fix hoile pore findé páowa jaitó párore."
detail.rewrite_aria: Note save kortê taika AI diyé sel field revise kortê
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: Ei field khaali. Copy korar kiçhu naai.
detail.confirm_reset_body: Tuñi ei lekha-o onek boro bodol aañice. Reset korle tumar hokkol sompaadon naas ori jáibo.
settings.heading: Taijing
settings.language_desc: Tomar browser-or language onujai default oy.
settings.live_search_off: Bilañ / Enter çap koiçça natija dekloi.
settings.ai_enable_desc: Tuñar AI Instructions-er upor vitthi kore Description ttha/ba Suggested Fix sonsodhan kore.
settings.privacy_body_1: Ekun hobbor kiccú tuñar browser-e localStorage diya locally raka oise. Amar kasse ba kono server-e kiccú pattao nai. Ja raka oise: theme, basa, platform filter, Live Search setting, AI provider preference, API key, rankings, star, archive kora item, pin kora item, recent findings, custom findings, personal corpus edit, ttha tuñar ses khulaano finding.
settings.privacy_body_2: API key hokkol sirf tuñar browser-e raka oise ttha seedha tuñar configure kora AI provider-e patao oise. Amar kono din taoi dekhi na ba pai na. Tuñi jei kono waqt niche AI settings teke ba ei page-er browser site data clear kore taoi sore dite paro.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI translation ttha base public corpus AI diya translate kora oiysse, tate vul thakte pare. Kono user-er dewa data, custom findings, ba personal edit kono din translate-er loi patao jai na.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Reduced motion on ase. Confetti bá animation skip oiçe. Feri enable korçún laiggí, aapnár OS accessibility settings-o reduced motion off korán.
notfound.heading: 404: Somunddore harái giyé
notfound.body: Ei page nái. Home page-o fire jao.
party.announce_full: Utshob mode çalu! Font Comic Sans-e gese. Rong random ujjol palette-e gese. Rangçin confetti ekran-er upor theke pore. Mouse cursor magic wand hoise.
party.announce_reduced: Utshob mode çalu! Font Comic Sans-e gese. Rong random ujjol palette-e gese. Mouse cursor magic wand hoise. Confetti opaç hoise karon motion kom korise.
kofi.title: Ko-fi donation widget
about.what_body: Ettá manual audits laiggí accessibility findings-or ekta library. Aap jo dekçéle taá tailás korán, ekta milá description fán, aur aapnár report-o copy korán.
about.what_wcag: Ettá data WCAG 2.2 Level A aur AA cover kore, jo assan beçí organisation bebare aur besi law-o accessibility requirement-or base. Boro community jé failure pattern significant mone kore taár laiggí thora Level AAA Success Criteria oo sámiloç ase.
about.step_1_body: Liyini takayna — component nagar, elemento tipo, nozoray biboron.
about.step_2_body: Fattafatti result-or upor Priority Up/Priority Down arrow use kortê paron, result-or rank tune kortê. Star diyé age dekkao. Archive diyé lukao.
about.step_3_body: Tumar observation-er shathe shabse besi milá finding select korun. Result relevance onujayi rank kora hoise.
about.step_4_body: Ekta location prefix zog kortê paron (jemon "Global:") naile AI use kortê paron wording revise kortibarte.
about.feature_ai_body: Aapnár notes anujai finding rewrite korçún laiggí AI bebarán. Anthropic, OpenAI, wá Google t¿ aapnár nija API key ánán. Ettá aapnár browser-o thake aur amará kono dik pathái na. Taá set up korán
about.feature_languages_body: Ettá library RTL support sহ 50-o besi bhásá-o pawa jaise. Bhásá, sanskriti, aur linguistics-or laiggí amar morboba aur akorshon ase. Eta sob bhásá jog korá ekta side quest chíl, aadhek eksperiment, aadhek rabbit hole, aadhek thora pata haráiyá giyé. Translations AI-generated, tai translation mistake songgé taá mone raikçún. Correction welcome. Bodlán
about.feature_a11y_body: WCAG 2.2 anujái toiri. Focus management, live regions, full keyboard navigation, reduced motion support, aur high-contrast color tokens sámiloç.
about.coming_auth: Google mana GitHub sign in devices.
about.coming_custom: Tomar nijor custom finding add abur edit koro, cloud-e privately store kora.
settings.reset_all: Settings Reset ttha Data Clear Koro
settings.confirm_reset_all_heading: Settings Reset ttha Data Clear Koro
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: API keys taijing sabgo. Mana ferot.
settings.unsaved_body: Aapnár kisu unsaved bodol ase. Aap ki korçún çan?
settings.language_changed_announce: Bhásá: Updated, confirm korçún laiggí Save button dábán
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Description o suggested fix steps seedha tumar spreadsheet ba report-e copy korun.
detail.revise_desc_checkbox: Revision-e Finding Details / Description include koro
detail.revise_error_body: Revise kortibarte ekta samasya óiyeché. Abar kortibarte Save & Revise Selected press kortê.
settings.api_key_error: Error: AI Assist on thakle API key lagé.
error.heading: Ekta Samasya Óiyeché
error.body: Finding library load hoité pareni. Tomar connection check koro abur
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: API key valid na ba expire óiyeché ({provider}). Settings-e aapnar key dobara check kortê.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit ses óiyeché ({provider}). Ektu opekkha kortê tarrpor abar kortê.
detail.revise_error_service_error: {provider} service-e samasya óiyeché ({status}). Koyekkhon porê abar kortê.
detail.revise_error_network_error: Internet connection nai. Aapnar connection check kortê tarrpor abar kortê.
settings.reset_all_announce: Hobbor Settings Reset ttha Data Clear Hoiysse.
about.what_body_2: Consistency onek dorkar, bisesh kore ai industry-te, aami nisít thakbár cháisilam impact, severity, description, o aksar milá technical suggested fix steps-e. Ai homebrew library-te WCAG-aligned finding write-up khujun, tumar observation-er shathe milá ekkán béche nun, customize korun ba specific kichu jogun, taarpor seedha tumar audit report-e copy/paste korun.
error.announce: Kichu ekta gôl hoiyé. Finding library load hoite naré. Apnar connection check koro taini abar try koro.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Biboron aar tajoij kora fix eksoñge copy koro
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Biboron aar tajoij kora fix asal moton reset koro
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Accessibility r developer communities-or companies-or boro ads pao. Tuáñr privacy-o soman rákki zaiyét, kono tracking nái, kono profile nái, kono algorithm nái.
onboarding.heading: A11yFred-o suagot
onboarding.confirm_body: Tuñí tour-or ses-o poúzé naái. Honi band itará r báki bád dobi?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Tuñí ki dekésas oitta biyán kor: ekta component-or naam, lokhon, baa WCAG success criterion. Corpus sankóit itaróon Platform r WCAG Level filters bybár kor. Honi zoikke dekkáse oittár moddé filter itaróon Narrow Results bybár kor. Results relevance onuzaiyé, taróor severity onuzaiyé sort zaiyét.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Results gurutiyanuzaiyé rank itaróon Rank Up/Down bybár kor. Ekta finding-tá hamesha agé dekkánoón laigí Star kor. Olla searches-o agé rákóon laigí ekta finding-tá Pin kor.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Ekkán finding kulot fata kori taar title, WCAG criterion, description, aau suggested fix deikko. Description-r áge ekta location prefix jog deo (masolan 'Global:'). AI Assist bebár kori tuáin-r notes diyé jekun field révisé koro, tarpor field aláda aláda copy koro naailé Copy All bebár kori ékbaré shob kin neo.
search.narrow_clear_aria: Narrow filter saaf kor r reset kor
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Native app-or coverage web-or tuloná moddé kom.
search.hint_ranking: Results kemon sort zaiyét oitta thik itaróon Rank Up/Down bybár kor. Ekta result hamesha agé dekkánoón laigí Star kor.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Ekta word darkar itaróon +term r baad itaróon -term bybár kor (jemon
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Narrow filter saaf kor r full search-o firrí zao
search.view_all_confirm_filters_change: Oitta boro boro thikki badle kor
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: 1 result pin zaisse r hamesha dekkásse.
search.view_all_confirm_pinned: {count} results pin zaisse r hamesha dekkásse.
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: 1 star zaisse r hamesha agé dekkábo.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} star zaisse r hamesha agé dekkábo.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 archive zaisse r hamesha results-or list-or ses-o dekkábo.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} archived áse taá list-ol sesa-sait hama dekhaibó.
results.sort_live_hint: Live Search sabil áse. Liká ba selection change gorle results turánt sort hoibó.
results.summary_query: '{query}' loi result deikkaiyé, '{sort}' diyé sort hoiré, '{narrow}' diyé narrow hoiré, {platform}.
results.summary_no_query: '{sort}' diyé sort hoiré, '{narrow}' diyé narrow hoiré, {platform}.
results.summary_no_narrow: '{query}' loi result deikkaiyé, '{sort}' diyé sort hoiré, {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Smart sorting awalé Severity diyá order gorê, tarpor tuáñar nijja ranking score diyá. Starred item hamesha upore ásê; Archived item hamesha niche ásê. Iá default sort order.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA criteria iá corpus-ot selective support áse. Sakal AAA success criteria represent na hoiyé, taá kunu entry AAA mark hoiléo strict conformance-or bodole best-practice guidance reflect goriyé thaibbó.
results.sort_popularity_info: Agla update-ot, iá sakal account-or user interaction tuñí aggregated global popularity reflect goribó. Aijjogá, popularity session-based taá app band gorle reset hoiyé záibó.
results.narrow_title: Iá results aro teng gorí filter gorí
results.rank_hint: Results upore ba niche rank gorí sort adjust gorí. Awal dekhaibbár laiggá Star gorí. Lukaibbár laiggá Archive gorí. (Undone gorá záibó.)
results.unpin_from_search: Iá result pinned áse. Search results-ot rakhibár laiggá unpin gorí.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Noya finding kholla tumar collapsed panel aar kono na-saañcá changes naas ori dibo.
detail.include_title_when_copied: Copy korar time sirnam soñg nao
detail.include_desc_title_when_copied: Copy korar time Biboron sirnam soñg nao
detail.include_fix_title_when_copied: Copy korar time Tajoij Kora Fix sirnam soñg nao
detail.ai_revision_hint: Upore checkbox diya kon field bodol korbo select koro, eikane tumar notes likho, taailée AI oi field gun rewrite koró dibo. AI model bodol korte bá band korte, jao
detail.finding_note_hint: Eikane context likho: jaiga, severity notes, bá project-er kono kichu. AI Assist chalu koro
detail.finding_note_hint_suffix: taailée oi tumar notes doría rewrite koró dibo.
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: jemon: ei-ta mobile-er jonno specific, element hoise tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: jemon: Critical severity, Onboarding flow juŕe pao géiye. Ei gun fix hoile niice-er severity issues ukti aasibár páre.
detail.ai_revision_aria: AI instructions saañcao aar selected field gun bodol koro
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Bodol korar time kichu gorbor hoiyé géiye. Abar costaás korte Save & Selected Bodol Koro button dabaao.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: Invalid bá meiad shesh API key ({provider}). Settings-e tumar key dobara check koro.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Rate limit shesh hoiyé géiye ({provider}). Éktu opekkha kori abar costaás koro.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: {provider} service error ({status}). Koyék second por abar costaás koro.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Internet connection naai. Tumar connection check kori abar costaás koro.
help.take_tour_description: A11yFred kibá kaam kore taá feri deikçún laiggí onboarding tour aabar calán.
help.step_1_body: Aap taip korçé taás fol aaise. Web wá Native App findings sileç korçún laiggí Settings-o Platform filter bebarán (assan besi web-focused). Ekta sabd dorkar korçún laiggí +term bebarán aur ekta baad diçún laiggí -term bebarán (jemon keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Aar fol-o Rank Up aur Rank Down button ase taá kibá rank kore taá bodlaiçún laiggí. Ekta fol-o Star diyán taá orrá aage aaise laiggí. Jokkon tailás korá oo fol-o subor rakçún laiggí jokkon tailás Pin korán.
help.step_3_body: Aap jo dekçéle taár loge best milá finding sileç korán. Fol agé relevance diyé, fere severity diyé sorted.
help.step_4_body: Description-o ekta location prefix add soro (masolan 'Global:' ba 'Cart:'). AI Assist on thaikle, tumar notes-gula Revision Notes field-o add soro tahole AI finding-ta tumar context-o match koiré rewrite koriyé dibi.
help.step_5_body: Description aur suggested fix aapnár spreadsheet wá report-o copy korán. Duwi field ekbáro niyé çún laiggí Copy All bebarán.
help.shortcuts_note: Shortcuts sokún active jokkon focus result list-o ase. Ettá bebariyé list na sáiré quickly navigate kori findings rate korçún fáre.
about.what_body_2_prefix: Assan eki masala skoro site-o aaise. Ettá tool aapnár descriptions report-o sorboda consistent rakhe jené aap aarfáro shuru na koriyé lekçún fáre. Library asl audit kaam t¿ toiri, fere AI diyé plain language, consistency, accuracy, aur
about.feature_agentic_body: Aap Claude (Anthropic) bebarçé tasilé, Match Existing Style oo enable korçún fáre. AI aap aaçé jé tone aur depth establish korçéle taá milaiçún laiggí fáit revision examples tailás kori dibo, sokún aaçí finding taá isolated-o rewrite na kori.
about.examples_ath001_label: Label Na Tákçé Button wá Link
about.examples_ath010_label: Control Label Maqçad Na, Rukun Bornon Kore
settings.party_confirm_body: Assan beshi ajibbá aur mubkin kisu accessible na oibá.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Ettá translation AI-generated aur kono native Rohingya speaker review na korçe.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Rohingya manush genocide aur zorê bedhân-khorçon suñçe. Ettá translation songgé jatn bebarán, aur aap parilé correction diyé jogdan korán.
settings.platform_all_desc: Web, native app, ttha dokkument — hobbor result dekao.
settings.ranking_on: Ranking control hoikol result-e dekha jaisse.
settings.starred_results_desc: Star dewa item hobbor upore aaise, jei order-e star dewa oiccilo sei order-e.
settings.archived_results_desc: Archive kora item hobbor result-er ekdom niche aaise.
settings.rankings_desc: Tuñi result-e ja up ttha down rank dicco taoi. Ekta result onainna-de tuwañot beshi rank hole, search-e agot aaise.
settings.confirm_reset_all_keep_item_cor: Tuñar personal entry ttha edit hokkol
